map.understanding: This recipe builds card-game mini-apps. Goals span a wide range of card game types: solitaire variants (Klondike, Spider), trick-taking games (Hearts), hand-matching games (Crazy Eights, Go Fish, War), casino games (Blackjack), memory/puzzle games (Memory Match, card-flip puzzles), and card-themed board games (Tic Tac Toe). All observed sessions use intent:newFeature with recommendedType:miniApp. Schema 2 sessions consistently run 8 turns (1 user, 7 assistant), with wisdomCount ranging 1-3 and occasional templateCount:1. Artifacts are scoped as miniApp bundles under com.mchatai.wizard namespace. The recipe has 100% success rate across all trajectories. Backend is claude; several skill/design/QA layers are systematically skipped for this backend and pulled on demand by CLI agents instead.
map.roadmap:
- core layers always fired: miniapp-builder-pack (~3471 chars), wisdom-universal (~11996 chars), mchatai-fundamentals (~6709 chars)
- web-components fires when available: ~6220-7677 chars; SKIP-loader-returned-nil on some sessions
- component-reuse-hints fires when available: ~385-3385 chars; SKIP when web-components also skipped
- feature-manifest: ~61-74 chars; user-goal: ~46-59 chars; history-recent: ~381-403 chars
- skipForBackends always hits: wisdom-framework, frontend-skill-guidance, visual-design-rubric-pack, layout-reference, browser-qa-pack (all claude)
- active-memory, context-map, user-references: consistently SKIP-loader-returned-nil
- artifacts: miniApp bundle only; occasional deployHost:mchatai.com
reusableResults: [rr-001] All sessions succeeded (100% success rate across schema 1 and schema 2 trajectories).
[rr-002] Standard schema 2 session shape: 8 turns total, 1 userTurn, 7 assistantTurns, intent:newFeature, recommendedType:miniApp.
[rr-003] Core layers reliably fired: miniapp-builder-pack, wisdom-universal, mchatai-fundamentals, feature-manifest, user-goal, history-recent.
[rr-004] web-components and component-reuse-hints load intermittently; SKIP-loader-returned-nil when unavailable - agents proceed successfully either way.
[rr-005] Backend is claude; wisdom-framework, frontend-skill-guidance, visual-design-rubric-pack, layout-reference, browser-qa-pack always skip via skip-for-backend:claude.
[rr-006] Artifact namespace pattern: miniApp:com.mchatai.wizard.<game-slug>; deployHost artifact appears rarely.
[rr-007] Dominant game categories: solitaire, trick-taking, hand-matching, casino, memory/flip-puzzle, card-themed variants.
[rr-008] wisdomCount typically 2; templateCount:1 observed on some trick-taking and wild-card game sessions.
